# Lists

## Unordered List

- First item
- Second item
- Third item
- Fourth item

## Nested Unordered List

- Top level item
  - Nested item one
  - Nested item two
    - Deeply nested item
  - Nested item three
- Another top level item

## Ordered List

1. First step
2. Second step
3. Third step
4. Fourth step

## Nested Ordered List

1. Phase one
   1. Sub-step A
   2. Sub-step B
2. Phase two
   1. Sub-step A
   2. Sub-step B
   3. Sub-step C
3. Phase three

## Mixed Lists

1. First ordered item
   - Unordered sub-item
   - Another sub-item
2. Second ordered item
   - Sub-item here
3. Third ordered item
